# Compare with previous frame

prev_blue = [n for n in prev_seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'b']
print("\nBlue objects before RIGHT:")
for bn in prev_blue:
    print(f"  Node {bn['id']}: {bn['pixels']}px, boundary={bn['boundary']}, children={bn['children']}")
</parameter>
</function>
